expected_visible_relationship: Smooth shaded wheel and tread forms should show hard rim/corner loop distinction while rounded rubber tire faces stay smooth and unfaceted.
actual_visible_diagnosis: User cloud review reports no-op churn. The selected edges were wrong or the exported change did not create a visible difference.
root_cause: The v1.5 gate still proved source markers and primitive counts, not that the exported GLB contains the intended normal discontinuity at rim loops and smooth continuity across tire-band segments.
forbidden_next_green: Do not accept v1.6 unless the exported GLB buffer itself proves hard normal splits at rim/corner loops and smooth tire-band radial continuity. Source text, material names, extras, modifiers, and build tokens are insufficient.
visual_acceptance: Cloud/Sense only; local capture is forbidden.
